title: smilacina henryi var. szechuanica
intro: Smilacina henryi var. szechuanica, also known as the Chinese false lilyturf or Szechuan leathery lilyturf, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Smilacaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Smilacina henryi var. szechuanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Smilacina henryi var. szechuanica is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in modern herbal medicine as a tincture or capsule.
